name: analyzer
description: Performs analysis operations on content including question extraction, keyword analysis, and tabular data statistics with anomaly detection and trend identification.

capabilities.name: question_extraction
capabilities.description: Extract clinical questions from text content

capabilities.name: keyword_extraction
capabilities.description: Extract important keywords and topics from text

capabilities.name: data_analysis
capabilities.description: Compute statistics, detect anomalies, and identify trends in tabular data

capabilities.name: clinical_interpretation
capabilities.description: Generate natural language interpretations of clinical data via LLM
